raw: The pass admits up to four people at 50% off. Full price admissions are: Mansion Tour $25 Mansion Tour - Senior $20 Mansion tour - Children $17 Grounds Pass (May 1 - Sept 30) $12 Grounds Pass (Nov 1 - April 30) $6 The house is open daily 10 am to 5 pm. But be sure to check their website for any changes before you reserve this pass. Purchase the tickets on the house's website after reserving your pass here.
